symptoms.symptom_name: Trivial-movement onset lumbar pain with paraspinal spasm

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Onset with a trivial movement and paraspinal spasm without neuro features is typical of mechanical back pain.
Normal bladder/bowel, no saddle numbness and normal legs argue strongly against cauda equina.

symptoms.symptom_name: No radicular leg pain below the knee

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Absence of radicular leg pain argues against significant radiculopathy.

investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Imaging not indicated for non-specific low back pain without red flags.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Urgent MRI (if cauda equina/serious cause suspected)
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Only if red flags develop — via ED.
